Title: Tri-View Taxonomy Platform
Description: The application shell and navigation: a single engagement viewed through three synchronised perspectives (Value Streams, MRI PMX System, Mapping) sharing one hierarchy (Tab -> Column -> Card) and one detail panel.

Title: Business Process View - CRE Powered Value Streams
Description: The 'what the business does' perspective, organised as CRE Powered value streams. Cards carry market, vertical and standards detail and are enriched during discovery.

Title: MRI PMX System View
Description: The 'how the ERP supports it' perspective, organised by MRI PMX module. Each system process carries MRI screen navigation, setup prerequisites and associated screens.

Title: Business-to-System Linkage & Mapping
Description: Connect each business process to the system process(es) that deliver it, navigate between counterparts, and visualise coverage and gaps in a matrix.

Title: System Coverage Tagging
Description: Tag each value-stream process with how fully MRI PMX covers it (Full / Partial / Outside), filter by it, bulk-apply it, and surface guidance via tooltips and link warnings.

Title: Scope Management
Description: Tag system processes as Core / Custom / Out of Scope, auto-derive out-of-scope for unlinked items, filter by scope with live counts, and bulk-tag columns.

Title: Client Versioning & Content Editing
Description: Author content in-browser (Edit Mode), capture client-specific notes, and save/load named client versions that snapshot content, links, tags and visibility across all views. Includes undo and reset.

Title: Document Generation & Export
Description: Produce client-ready Word and PDF documents from the current or all visible tabs, respecting scope tags and the market/vertical selection.

Title: Multi-ERP Expansion
Description: Future direction: map the same business processes against additional ERPs (Yardi planned) and share client versions between machines/users.

Title: View Switcher & Shared Shell
Description: A three-way view switcher (Value Streams / MRI PMX System / Mapping) over shared grid, header and detail-panel containers, so context carries across perspectives.

Title: Hierarchical Grid & Navigation
Description: The Tab -> Column -> Card grid with a right-hand detail panel, collapsible sub-processes, and horizontally scrolling tab bars for many modules/streams.

Title: CRE Powered Value Streams Taxonomy
Description: Ten CRE value streams (L1 tabs) each broken into process groups (L2 columns) and processes (L3 cards), with an enrichment flag on skeleton cards.
Parent: Business Process View - CRE Powered Value Streams

Title: Business Dimensions
Description: Per-card market variation (UK/US/EU), vertical/sector detail (Retail/Industrial/Office/Residential) and standards & frameworks (e.g. IFRS 16, ASC 842, EPRA).
Parent: Business Process View - CRE Powered Value Streams

Title: Business Filters
Description: Multi-select Market and Vertical filters that drive what the detail panel shows and which cards are visible.
Parent: Business Process View - CRE Powered Value Streams

Title: MRI PMX Module Taxonomy
Description: System processes organised by MRI PMX module -> functional area -> process -> optional sub-process, each with MRI navigation, prerequisites and associated screens.

Title: Placeholder Module Flagging
Description: Modules awaiting SME review (Job Cost, Corporate AR, Budgeting & Forecasting) are visibly flagged as provisional.

Title: Business-to-System Links
Description: Each business process links to one or more system processes and vice-versa, with click-through navigation to the counterpart.

Title: Link Editing in Edit Mode
Description: Add and remove links inside the edit dialog on both views using a searchable process picker; changes are captured per client version.

Title: Coverage Mapping Matrix & Gap Analysis
Description: A matrix of value-stream groups (rows) against MRI PMX modules (columns) showing link counts, drill-down to pairs, coverage colouring and unmapped-gap flags.

Title: Item-Level System Coverage Tag
Description: A single System Coverage tag (Full / Partial / Outside) on each value-stream process, with explanatory tooltips and a warning when a Full/Partial item is not yet linked.

Title: Coverage Filter
Description: A multi-select System Coverage filter beside Market and Vertical that shows/hides value-stream cards by their coverage tag.

Title: Bulk Coverage Tagging
Description: A 'Tag all' dropdown on each value-stream column header (Edit Mode) to set Full/Partial/Outside or clear tags across the whole column.

Title: System Scope Tagging
Description: Tag each system process Core / Custom / Out of Scope, with auto Out-of-Scope for processes not linked to any value stream, and bulk column tagging.

Title: Scope Filter & Empty-Column Handling
Description: A multi-select scope filter with live counts and expand/collapse-all, hiding non-matching items and empty columns while respecting collapse state.

Title: Edit Mode Content Authoring
Description: Add, edit and remove columns, processes and sub-processes in-browser, with view-specific edit forms and a per-item client note.

Title: Client Versions
Description: Save, load, rename and delete named version snapshots capturing content, links, coverage/scope tags, client notes and module visibility across all views; with undo and reset to original.

Title: Module & Stream Visibility
Description: Toggle which modules/streams are visible for a client; saved per version and reflected in exports.

Title: Word & PDF Export
Description: Export the current tab or all visible tabs to Word and PDF; system docs include a scope summary and respect scope tags; business docs include market/vertical/standards and respect the filter selection.

Title: Yardi as a Second ERP
Description: Future: add an ERP selector and a second system taxonomy plus link set so the same business processes can be mapped against Yardi.

Title: Version Sharing
Description: Future: export/import or shared storage so client versions can move between machines and users.

Title: Switch between the three engagement views
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to switch between the Value Streams, MRI PMX System and Mapping views, so that I can see the same engagement from the business, system and coverage perspectives.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am on any view
When I select a different view from the switcher
Then that view renders using the shared grid and header
And my place in the engagement (active tab where applicable) is preserved.

Title: Open a detail panel for any card
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to click a card to open a detail panel, so that I can read its full detail without leaving the grid.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a card is shown in any view
When I click the card in view mode
Then a right-hand detail panel opens showing the item's breadcrumb, title, badges and detail sections
And clicking the overlay or another card updates or closes the panel.

Title: Browse the Tab-Column-Card hierarchy
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to browse content as tabs, columns and cards, so that I can navigate a large taxonomy quickly.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a view is active
When it renders
Then top-level items appear as tabs, groups as columns and items as cards
And selecting a tab shows that tab's columns and cards.

Title: Expand and collapse sub-processes
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to expand or collapse a process's sub-processes, so that I can control detail density on screen.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process has sub-processes
When I click its expand toggle
Then its sub-processes are revealed and the toggle shows the count
And when collapsed the sub-processes are hidden
And an Expand all / Collapse all control toggles every process at once.

Title: Scroll a long tab bar
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want the tab bar to scroll horizontally when there are many tabs, so that all modules/streams remain reachable on a normal screen.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given more tabs exist than fit the viewport width
When I view the tab bar
Then it scrolls horizontally
And every tab can be reached and selected.

Title: Browse CRE value streams
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want to browse the CRE Powered value streams as tabs with their process groups and processes, so that I can frame discovery around recognised value streams.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given the Value Streams view is active
When I select a value-stream tab
Then its process groups render as columns and processes as cards
And supporting/enabling streams are visually distinguished.

Title: See which cards still need enrichment
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want skeleton L3 cards flagged as needing enrichment, so that I know what to fill in during discovery.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process card has not been enriched
When I view it
Then it shows a 'needs enrichment' flag
And the flag is explained in the detail panel.

Title: View market variation for a process
Description: As a Client SME / Reviewer, I want to see how a process varies by market for the markets I care about, so that geography-specific differences are explicit.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process has market variation content
And one or more markets are selected in the Market filter
When I open the process detail panel
Then I see one block per selected market that has content.

Title: View vertical/sector detail for a process
Description: As a Client SME / Reviewer, I want to see sector-specific detail for the verticals I care about, so that the taxonomy reflects my property type.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process has vertical detail
And one or more verticals are selected in the Vertical filter
When I open the process detail panel
Then I see one colour-tagged row per selected sector that has content.

Title: See standards and frameworks on a process
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want relevant standards/frameworks shown on a process, so that regulatory weight is visible at a glance.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process has standards
When I view its card
Then a standards count chip is shown with the standards on hover
And the detail panel lists each standard.

Title: Filter value streams by market
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to filter by one or more markets, so that I focus on the client's geographies.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given the Market filter offers UK, US and EU
When I change the selection
Then the grid and detail panel reflect only the selected markets
And the filter chip shows the current selection summary.

Title: Filter value streams by vertical
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to filter by one or more verticals, so that I focus on the client's property types.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given the Vertical filter offers Retail, Industrial, Office and Residential
When I change the selection
Then cards not relevant to the selected verticals are hidden
And vertical-agnostic cards remain visible.

Title: Browse the MRI PMX system taxonomy
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to browse MRI PMX by module, functional area, process and sub-process, so that I can locate system support for a business need.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given the MRI PMX System view is active
When I select a module tab
Then its functional areas render as columns and processes as cards, with optional sub-processes
And each level is navigable.

Title: See MRI setup detail for a system process
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want each system process to show its MRI screen/navigation, setup prerequisites and associated screens, so that I can advise on configuration.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a system process is selected
When its detail panel opens
Then it shows the MRI screen title/navigation, setup prerequisites and associated screens with descriptions.

Title: See placeholder modules flagged
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want placeholder modules clearly flagged, so that I do not present provisional content as final.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a module contains placeholder content (Job Cost, Corporate AR, Budgeting & Forecasting)
When I view that module
Then it is visibly flagged as awaiting SME review.

Title: See linked counterparts in both directions
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want a business process to show the system processes that deliver it and a system process to show the business processes it supports, so that I understand the mapping from either side.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process has links
When I open its detail panel
Then business items list 'Delivered in MRI PMX by' and system items list 'Supports Business Processes'
And each linked counterpart is listed with its breadcrumb.

Title: Navigate to a linked counterpart
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to click a linked process, so that I jump to its counterpart in the other view.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a linked counterpart is shown in the detail panel
When I click it
Then the app switches to the counterpart's view
And opens the counterpart's detail panel.

Title: Add a link in Edit Mode
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want to add a business-system link from within the edit dialog using a searchable picker, so that I can build the mapping during discovery.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am editing an item in Edit Mode
When I open the link editor and search for a counterpart
And select it
Then a link is created between the two items
And it appears in both items' link lists
And the change marks the version dirty for saving.

Title: Remove a link in Edit Mode
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want to remove a link from the edit dialog, so that I can correct the mapping.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given an item has one or more links
When I remove a link in the edit dialog
Then the link is deleted from both items
And any affected coverage/auto-scope indicators update
And the change marks the version dirty.

Title: View the coverage mapping matrix
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want a matrix of value-stream groups against MRI PMX modules showing link counts, so that I can see overall coverage at a glance.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given links exist
When I open the Mapping view
Then a matrix shows value-stream groups as rows and MRI PMX modules as columns
And each populated cell shows its link count and a coverage colour
And a summary shows how many groups are mapped.

Title: Drill into a matrix cell
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to click a matrix cell, so that I can see the specific business-system pairs behind the count.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a populated matrix cell
When I click it
Then the detail panel lists each business-system pair with coverage and navigable links.

Title: Identify coverage gaps
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want value-stream groups with no system counterpart flagged, so that I can show where the ERP does not support the business.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a value-stream group has no links to any system module
When I view the matrix
Then that group's row is flagged as unmapped
And the summary reflects the number of unmapped groups.

Title: Tag a value-stream process with system coverage
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want to tag a value-stream process Full, Partial or Outside, so that I record how much of it lives in MRI PMX.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am in Edit Mode on the Value Streams view
When I click a process's coverage badge
Then it cycles through Untagged -> Full -> Partial -> Outside
And the tag is shown on the card and in the detail panel
And the change marks the version dirty.

Title: See context for a coverage tag on hover
Description: As a Client SME / Reviewer, I want a tooltip explaining each coverage tag, so that I understand what Full, Partial and Outside mean.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process has a coverage tag
When I hover over the tag on the card, in the panel, in the matrix, or in the edit dialog
Then a tooltip shows the tag label and an explanation of its meaning.

Title: Be warned when a covered process is unlinked
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want a warning when a Full or Partial process has no system link, so that I remember to map it (without being blocked).
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a process is tagged Full or Partial
And it has no system link
When I view the card or its detail panel
Then a 'link needed' warning is shown
And I am still allowed to save the version.

Title: Filter value streams by system coverage
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want a System Coverage filter beside Market and Vertical, so that I can focus on Full, Partial, Outside or Untagged processes.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given the System Coverage filter offers Full, Partial, Outside and Untagged
When I change the selection
Then only processes whose coverage matches are shown
And a process is shown if it or one of its sub-processes matches.

Title: Bulk-tag a column's coverage
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want to tag every process in a value-stream column at once, so that I can set coverage efficiently.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am in Edit Mode on the Value Streams view
When I open a column's 'Tag all' dropdown and choose Full, Partial, Outside or Clear
Then every process and sub-process in that column takes that coverage (or is cleared)
And the change is undoable and marks the version dirty.

Title: Tag a system process's scope
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to tag a system process Core, Custom or Out of Scope, so that scope decisions are captured.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am in Edit Mode on the MRI PMX System view
When I cycle a process's scope tag
Then the process shows the scope as a badge and in the panel
And out-of-scope items are visually dimmed.

Title: Auto-derive out-of-scope for unlinked processes
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want system processes with no business link to default to Out of Scope, so that unused system areas are obvious without manual tagging.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a system process has no manual scope tag
And it is not linked to any value-stream process
When I view it
Then it is shown as Out of Scope with an 'auto' indicator
And a manual tag overrides the auto state.

Title: Bulk-tag a system column's scope
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to tag a whole system column Core/Custom/Out of Scope or clear it, so that I can scope efficiently.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am in Edit Mode on the MRI PMX System view
When I choose a scope from a column's 'Tag all' dropdown
Then every process and sub-process in that column takes that scope (or is cleared)
And the change is undoable.

Title: Filter the system view by scope
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to filter by scope with live counts, so that I can review only in-scope or out-of-scope work.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given the scope filter offers Core, Custom, Out of Scope and Untagged
When I change the selection
Then non-matching processes and empty columns are hidden
And live counts reflect the current selection
And collapse state is respected during filtering.

Title: Add, edit and remove business items
Description: As a Business Analyst, I want to add, edit and remove domains, processes and sub-processes in the Value Streams view, so that I can tailor the taxonomy to the client.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am in Edit Mode on the Value Streams view
When I add, edit or remove an item
Then the change is applied to the grid
And the business edit form captures description, activities, market, vertical, standards, coverage, client note and links
And the change is undoable.

Title: Add, edit and remove system items
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to add, edit and remove columns, processes and sub-processes in the MRI PMX System view, so that I can tailor system content.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am in Edit Mode on the MRI PMX System view
When I add, edit or remove an item
Then the change is applied to the grid
And the system edit form captures MRI screen, prerequisites, associated screens, client note and links
And the change is undoable.

Title: Capture a client note on an item
Description: As a Client SME / Reviewer, I want to record a client-specific note on any item (editable only in Edit Mode), so that engagement context is retained.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am editing an item in Edit Mode
When I enter a client note and save
Then the note is stored on the item and shown read-only in the detail panel
And it is captured in the saved version and in undo.

Title: Save a named client version
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to save a named snapshot of the engagement, so that each client's tailoring is preserved.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I have made changes
When I save a named version
Then a snapshot is stored capturing business and system content, links, coverage/scope tags, client notes and module visibility
And the version appears in the versions list.

Title: Load, rename and delete versions
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to load, rename and delete saved versions, so that I can manage multiple clients.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given saved versions exist
When I load a version
Then the app restores that version's content, links, tags and visibility across all views
And I can rename or delete a version from the versions list.

Title: Undo recent changes
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to undo my recent changes, so that I can recover from mistakes during editing.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I have made one or more changes in Edit Mode
When I choose Undo
Then the most recent change is reverted (up to the retained history limit)
And the view restores to the correct tab/perspective for that change.

Title: Reset to original content
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to reset to the original factory content, so that I can start a client from a clean baseline.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given content has been changed
When I choose Reset
Then the active content is restored to the original factory taxonomy
And saved versions are unaffected.

Title: Toggle module and stream visibility
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to hide modules/streams that are out of scope for a client, so that the app and exports show only what's relevant.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am configuring a client
When I toggle a module/stream off
Then it is hidden from the view and from exports
And the visibility choice is saved with the version.

Title: Export to Word
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to export the current tab or all visible tabs to Word, so that I can deliver a document to the client.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given content is loaded
When I generate a Word document for the current or all visible tabs
Then a Word file is produced containing the selected content
And system docs include a scope summary and respect scope tags
And business docs include market/vertical/standards and respect the filter selection.

Title: Export to PDF
Description: As an Implementation Consultant, I want to export to PDF, so that I can share a fixed-format document.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given content is loaded
When I generate a PDF for the current or all visible tabs
Then a PDF is produced reflecting the same scope and filter rules as the Word export.

Title: Select the target ERP
Description: As a Product Admin, I want to choose which ERP the system view maps against, so that the same business processes can be mapped to different ERPs.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given more than one ERP taxonomy is available
When I select an ERP
Then the System view and link set switch to that ERP
And the Mapping view reflects the selected ERP.

Title: Share a client version between users
Description: As an Engagement Lead, I want to export and import client versions, so that engagements can move between machines and teammates.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a saved version exists
When I export it
Then a portable file is produced
And importing it on another machine recreates the version faithfully.
